name: geographic-nb
rationale: New Brunswick property; postal E3B 5C2 (E-prefix FSA = NB per FSA_LETTER_TO_PROVINCE map). F1.PC canonical-map resolves city/province from postal letter. Tests R10-D FSA-letter-to-province extension coverage for NB.
notes: Single-event sequence. Pair with E29 (NL) for non-ON-non-QC geographic coverage.
